name: python3-pymssql
title: python3-pymssql
summary: Python database access for MS SQL server and Sybase - Python 3
description:
Python database access for MS SQL server and Sybase - Python 3
This package contains a Python module allowing direct access to
Microsoft SQL server and Sybase databases. It is designed for
simplicity and performance, and conforms to Python DB-API 2.0.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pymssql because Python database access for MS SQL server and Sybase - Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pymssql as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pymssql with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pymssql --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
